commands.review_summary:
The branch adds a SwiftUI visionOS companion node app under apps/visionos plus docs/nodes/visionos.md for spatial, location, camera, APNs, and Gateway pairing behavior.

Reproducibility: yes. for the source-level PR findings: current main shows paramsJSON invoke requests, node.invoke.result error.message validation, node.event push.apns.register handling, and gateway.nodes.allowCommands docs that the branch does not match. I did not run Xcode or Vision Pro hardware in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: Maintainer review is needed because this is broad first-party hardware work with security-sensitive sensor/APNs/credential behavior, an open platform-policy dependency, and contributor hardware proof that automation cannot supply.
